title: cyclosorus longissimus
intro: Cyclosorus longissimus, also known as the "long fronded fern," is a species of flowering plant in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus longissimus include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol and blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
